title: Docker Build and Push
content:
name: Docker Build and Push
trigger: push
language: Docker
source: gha-dataset
success_rate: 0.88

yaml:
name: Docker Build
on: push
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v2
      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v4
        with:
          context: .
          push: false
          tags: myapp:latest
